objective: Implement the host-wide HDC server supervisor, endpoint isolation, authorization workflow and channel-protection independence against fake hdc executables.
deliverables: Supervisor with ownership/generation model that never auto-kills external/unknown servers.
Unauthorized-device workflow with bounded polling and no implicit server restart.
Authorization/channel-protection independence and version mismatchUnverified handling.

verification.method: Supervisor matrix against fake hdc executables as real child processes.
verification.expectedEvidence: External/unknown server automatic lifecycle call count is 0, ownership/generation transitions match the contract, endpoint isolation holds, and global server failure fans out to every affected coordinator exactly once.

stopConditions: Any automatic path issues kill/kill -r/start -r/killall-sub against an external server.
Authorization success is presented as channel encryption.
